_comment: Roadmap data — the single editable source for the landing roadmap (WEB_CONTENT_STRATEGY.md §4.8). Status enum: shipped | in-build | horizon. Rule: every numeric claim cites where it is measured, or it is omitted. No project-milestone months — regulatory dates live in deadlines.json.

items.label: Open regulatory core
items.detail: The EU DPP standard in Rust — pure, dependency-free, and fully open

items.label: Sector schemas
items.detail: Battery, textile and steel

items.label: Signing and identity
items.detail: Local signing, did:web identity, and key rotation

items.label: Resolution and interop
items.detail: GS1 Digital Link, QR, and AAS submodel export

items.label: Sandboxed sector plugins
items.detail: Each sector's rules run isolated, with signature verification

items.label: End-to-end node
items.detail: Create, sign, publish, and resolve a passport end to end

items.label: Full lifecycle provenance
items.detail: Suspend, archive, typed end-of-life, and dual-signed transfer of responsibility — on a tamper-evident, hash-chained audit trail

items.label: Evidence dossiers + offline verification
items.detail: Export a signed dossier and verify it with zero network — no trust in Odal required

items.label: Registry-ready outbox
items.detail: Registration intent survives crashes and drains with backoff; the live connector activates when the EU publishes its API

items.label: Signed compliance-ruleset channel
items.detail: Rulesets arrive as Ed25519-signed bundles, verified fail-closed and hot-swapped; a production node refuses placeholder trust adapters

items.label: Bulk import
items.detail: CSV and Excel with dry-run validation and per-row errors

columns.title: In build
columns.description: Under active work with a defined target.

items.label: Electronics sector
items.detail: Schema and plugin, prepared ahead of an electronics delegated act

items.label: EU Central Registry connector
items.detail: Ready for the registry API; activates when the specification publishes

items.label: eIDAS qualified-seal path
items.detail: Qualified trust service provider selection in progress

items.label: Unsold-goods disclosure export
items.detail: Report artifact for the July 2026 textile obligation

items.label: Operator dashboard
items.detail: Passport management UI for managed and self-hosted nodes

columns.title: Horizon
columns.description: Planned; not in active work. No dates are promised here on purpose.

items.label: Multi-operator hosting
items.detail: Isolated per-operator deployments at fleet scale

items.label: Edge-cached public resolver
items.detail: CDN-cached passport pages for global scan latency

items.label: Further sectors
items.detail: Construction, tyres, furniture, detergents — as delegated acts finalise

items.label: Conformance services
items.detail: Verification badge against EN 18222/18223 once the standards are final

items.label: EBSI did:ebsi
items.detail: EU-operated DID method as an alternative issuer-identity path, if registry requirements call for it
